title: Complete foundational form grammar
statement: The complete foundational form grammar has exactly two productions: the structural One leaf, and a finite Fold node with two recursively generated child forms on distinct held-labelled edges and an explicit return relation to the parent whole.

candidate_grammar.generator: Generate the complete product of One-base inclusion, recursive child arity, edge-label relation, child provenance, return relation, finite termination and unforced-extra-production presence.
candidate_grammar.boundary: All recursive production-rule shapes for finite forms assembled only from the admitted structural One and minimal Fold.

intended_certificate: Independent regeneration of 288 production-rule shapes and recursive sample forms.
